# Erich's Lab

> A public shelf for ideas that are useful before they are finished.

Erich's Lab (lab.erichdonahue.com) is a companion site to erichdonahue.com — a low-ceremony space for small tools, learning artifacts, data experiments, and prototypes by Erich Donahue. Experiments can stay lightweight, graduate into larger projects, or simply remain useful working objects.

## Current experiments

- Music-Credit Graph Study Lab: https://lab.erichdonahue.com/projects/music-graph-study/ — A concept guide, architecture plan, adaptive quiz, and flashcard lab for a distributed music-credit graph using Python, Docker Swarm, Redis/RQ, Parquet/DuckDB, and PostgreSQL. Available as a full offline single-file HTML download.

## About

Erich Donahue is a decision science product and data platform leader based in the Orlando, Florida area. He builds practical decision tools, forecasting workflows, data products, music tools, and local-first creative systems. The lab is where ideas live before they are production-ready.
